title: Last letter
prompt: Return the last character of the string s. In Python, s[-1] means 'the last character'. last_char('cyber') returns 'r'.

details.restate: Give back just the final character of the text — one single character, still as a string.

io.because: in a one-letter string, the last character is its only one

terms.meaning: a single letter, digit, or symbol inside a string
